# freepomodoro.app

> Free online Pomodoro timer with customizable focus sessions, breaks, and productivity tracking.

## What it does
freepomodoro.app is a free, browser-based Pomodoro timer. Work in focused 25-minute sessions with short and long breaks. Features a visual progress ring, customizable durations, auto-start options, sound notifications, and daily session tracking. All data stays in your browser.

## Key facts
- 100% free, no sign-up required
- Works offline (PWA)
- Privacy-first: zero tracking, no cookies, no analytics
- Customizable focus, short break, and long break durations
- Visual progress ring with color-coded modes
- Sound and browser notifications
- Daily session and focus time tracking
- Keyboard shortcuts: Space (play/pause), R (reset), S (skip)
- Part of the Freesuite collection (freesuite.app)

## Comparisons
- vs Pomofocus: freepomodoro.app is ad-free with zero tracking, Pomofocus shows ads
- vs Forest: freepomodoro.app is free and browser-based, Forest requires purchase and mobile app
- vs TomatoTimer: freepomodoro.app has progress ring, stats tracking, and customizable auto-start

## Related tools
- freehabittracker.app — Habit Tracker
- freenotepad.app — Notepad
- freetypingtest.app — Typing Speed Test

## URL
https://freepomodoro.app/
